title: The Go-To Machine-Knit Hat
hero: Design the perfect custom hat with precise sizing, brim options, and crown shaping.
description:
The Go-To Machine-Knit Hat is a foundational hat pattern you’ll come back to again and again.

Designed for machine knitters, this pattern adapts to your gauge and measurements, then lets you choose from four different crown styles — no recalculating, no guesswork.

Clear, machine-knitting specific instructions walk you through cast-on, body, and crown shaping, with options for a gathered crown, segmented wedge crowns or a smooth spiral finish. Whether you want structure or softness, this single pattern gives you flexible, reliable results.

Knit it plain, knit it patterned, knit it again — this is the hat pattern that earns its place as your go-to.

One pattern. Multiple crown options. Your fit.
excerpt: A custom-fit machine-knit hat pattern with four crown styles, designed to work with your gauge and knitting style.
aliases: knit hat on a knitting machine
metaTitle: Machine-Knit Hat Pattern – Custom Fit with Multiple Crown Styles
metaDescription: Create a perfectly fitting machine-knit hat using your own gauge. One pattern includes multiple crown styles with clear, machine-knitting specific instructions.

schemaMarkup.name: Custom-Fit Machine-Knit Hat
